titles.title: We Are United in Jesus Christ

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1 v6 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are united in Jesus Christ We are the soldiers of the light We don’t wrestle flesh and blood But principalities of the dark We do our marching to one beat Crushing the enemy under our feet We are mighty in our stand With God’s word in our hands.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In our hearts, we have a vision We have made our decision To show the Father’s love With great power from above.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let us reach this generation Every tribe and every nation For we’ve overcome the world By the blood of Christ The Lamb.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Lord our God is a sword and shield We fight our battles on our knees.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We do our marching to one beat Crushing the enemy under our feet We are mighty in our stand With God’s word in our hands.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We are mighty in our stand With God’s word in our hands. We are mighty in our stand With God’s word in our hands. We are mighty!
